summary: Positive fan impression with standout Spencer Davis cover and a rescuing CC Rider, though no clear details on recording source or quality
review: The lone reviewer rates this show highly, enjoying a Spencer Davis‑style number and the “CC Rider” jam that they say was rescued by Jerry Garcia and Brent Mydland. Recording specifics are not mentioned, so the technical quality remains uncertain.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one enthusiastic 5‑star review; strong praise for musical moments but no concrete information on recording fidelity, leading to a good‑but‑cautious overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments about the sound source or clarity; reviewer’s positive tone suggests the audio was at least listenable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer highlights a few moments (the Spencer Davis‑style tune and CC Rider) but provides no broader commentary on set pacing.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Mentioned as helping rescue the performance during CC Rider
band_member_comments.Bob: Referred to indirectly as “bobby” in relation to vocals
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent Mydland noted for stepping in and rescuing the jam
